title: Stryker India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Stryker India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
